comments: Two's Up - The listeners' Top 10.  The full show is available on Mixcloud.
In 1980 listeners were asked to submit just the one track that they considered the best ever. In the previous year they had been asked to submit their top three.

track_listing.track: 'Child In Time' (LP-In Rock) (Harvest) Not on the tape.
'Freebird' (2xLP-One More From The Road) (MCA) Not on the tape.
'Stairway To Heaven' (2xLP-The Song Remains The Same) (Swan Song) Not on the tape.
